name: Arlong
effect: [On K.O.] Up to 2 of your opponent's rested cards will not become active in your opponent's next Refresh Phase. [Activate: Main] [Once Per Turn] You may give 1 of your opponent's rested DON!! cards to 1 of your opponent's Characters: Give up to 1 rested DON!! card from its owner's cost area to its owner's Leader or 1 of their Characters.
